title: Validate File Uploads Before Storage or Parsing
prompt: Use $nestjs-production-api-contracts to improve this code according to api-file-upload-boundary.
notes: Validate file size, MIME, extension, and authorization before storage or parsing. Do not trust original file names or client-declared content type alone.

title: Keep OpenAPI Contracts Bound to DTOs
prompt: Use $nestjs-production-api-contracts to improve this code according to api-openapi-contracts.
notes: Bind controller input and output to DTOs. OpenAPI decorators should document the same DTOs that validation and serialization use.

title: Version Public APIs and Normalize Error Envelopes
prompt: Use $nestjs-production-api-contracts to improve this code according to api-versioning-error-contracts.
incorrect:
// INCORRECT: Internal details leak to clients and the shape is unstable.
throw new Error(`Failed to update ${email}: ${dbError.message}`);
notes: Use API versioning for breaking changes and exception filters/public exception types for stable client-facing error contracts. Keep internal details in logs.

title: Centralize HTTP Hardening in Bootstrap
prompt: Use $nestjs-production-api-contracts to improve this code according to security-http-hardening.
notes: Configure CORS, Helmet, cookies, proxy trust, and body-size policy in bootstrap. Avoid wildcard origins when credentials are enabled.

title: Compose Guards with Resource Policy Checks
prompt: Use $nestjs-production-api-contracts to improve this code according to security-policy-guards.
notes: Authentication is not authorization. Resource-specific policies must check ownership, tenant membership, or role permissions before mutating data.

title: Configure Rate Limits for Proxy Topology
prompt: Use $nestjs-production-api-contracts to improve this code according to security-rate-limit-proxy.
notes: Behind proxies, configure trusted proxy behavior and rate-limit tracker extraction. For multiple app instances, use shared throttler storage.
